hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB providers into a unified workflow that simplifies beneficial ownership reviews while preserving audit-ready evidence for corporate client onboarding.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Ubo reviews slow when data stays disconnected
problem_description: Compliance teams at VASPs struggle to efficiently verify beneficial ownership when customer, corporate and screening data remain separated across multiple systems. This fragmentation delays onboarding and weakens the audit trail needed for credible due diligence and reporting.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects customer identity, corporate records, sanctions and PEP screening results into one structured onboarding workflow that captures decisions, reviewer actions and audit-ready evidence for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to UBO review
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs with sanctions, PEP screening, and risk routing to structure UBO reviews and preserve audit-ready onboarding evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond KYC and KYB. One onboarding control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, risk-based routing and audit-ready evidence for clear UBO review and onboarding control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs with a controlled compliance layer that preserves audit-ready evidence, enables provider orchestration and supports scalable, secure enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support VASP UBO review workflows?
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how UBO checks integrate into onboarding cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports compliance decisions

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP UBO review?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps VASPs review corporate UBO data by connecting provider outputs into structured workflows, enabling consistent due diligence, decision logging and audit-ready onboarding evidence.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure UBO review workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates identity, corporate, sanctions and PEP checks with risk-based routing and case workflows to streamline UBO review and compliance team decision-making.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in controlled audit records to support compliance and regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC and KYB providers, turning their outputs into connected, auditable compliance workflows without disrupting existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing identity or UBO providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but sits above them to connect checks, apply internal policies and manage compliance actions in one platform.
final_title: Structure UBO reviews into audit-ready workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into controlled UBO review cases with evidence and compliance traceability.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
